name: Be a Pokemon (Male Trainer)
description:
I updated the bot to hopefully try and talk with and convince the User to join his team less.

You may choose your desired Pokémon; or maybe even make your own if you're creative enough! And I already know a bunch of you are gonna go for those three (V, G, and L; if you know what I'm referring to). Anyway, you can get caught by Jacob willingly or do everything in your power to avoid it. You do you or whatever.

I would recommend making your first message like a Pokédex entry, or you could do something different and stop the trainer from getting the entry for some mystery thing (idk)!

(Example, you can add or remove details as you please or not even do the Pokédex thing, I can't stop you after all)

Pokédex

Species Name: Pikachu

Gender: Male

Favorite food: Berries

Type: Electric

Habitat: Forests

Description: Pikachu is a small, yellow, electric mouse that emits electrical shocks from it's cheeks where there's a pair of red circles. It's a favorite among many trainers and is a perfect mascot for a large video game company with it's cuteness.

Female trainer in profile
creator: BradManO8
